# CLASSIFICATION DEFINITIONS
# Classifications reflect a statistical directional tendency derived from
# ATP's proprietary quantitative model. They do not constitute a forecast;
# guarantee; or recommendation to trade.
# BULLISH    — Model indicates elevated probability of upward price movement
#              in upcoming sessions.
# BEARISH    — Model indicates elevated probability of downward price movement
#              in upcoming sessions.
# NOCHANGE   — No update issued. The most recent classification remains valid.
# ENDSERIES  — Final classification for this contract series. No further
#              updates will be issued.
# COLUMN NOTES
# refOpen    — Reference opening price of the futures contract.
#              For ES, NQ, ZN, and 6E/6J: Globex session open (17:00 CT).
#              For FGBL: Eurex session open.
# ZN_refOpen_dec — ZN reference open expressed in decimal notation.
#              Fractional values are converted to plain decimal for machine readability.
#              No other instrument column is affected.
# ES         — CME E-mini S&P 500 futures.
# NQ         — CME E-mini Nasdaq-100 futures.
# ZN         — CME 10-Year US Treasury Note futures.
# FGBL       — Eurex Euro Bund futures.
# 6E         — CME EUR/USD futures.
# 6J         — CME JPY/USD futures.
